subtitles.original: 産まれついた時から
subtitles.english: Since the moment I was born,

subtitles.original: 忌み子 鬼の子として
subtitles.english: treated as an unwanted demon child,

subtitles.original: その身に余る 罰を受けた
subtitles.english: I received a punishment too great for my body to bear.

subtitles.original: 悲しいことは 何も無いけど
subtitles.english: There is nothing to be sad about, but...

subtitles.original: 夕焼け小焼け 手を引かれてさ
subtitles.english: as the sunset glows, my hand is taken and I am led away.

subtitles.original: 知らない 知らない 僕は何も知らない
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know, I don't know anything!

subtitles.original: 叱られた後のやさしさも
subtitles.english: Not even the kindness after being scolded,

subtitles.original: 雨上がりの手の温もりも
subtitles.english: nor the warmth of a hand after the rain.

subtitles.original: でも本当は 本当は 本当は 本当に
subtitles.english: But actually, actually, actually, I am really...

subtitles.original: 寒いんだ
subtitles.english: ...so cold.

subtitles.original: 死なない 死なない 僕はなんで死なない？
subtitles.english: I won't die, I won't die, why won't I die?

subtitles.original: 夢のひとつも 見れないくせに
subtitles.english: Even though I can't even have a single dream.

subtitles.original: 誰も知らない おとぎばなしは
subtitles.english: This fairy tale that no one knows

subtitles.original: 夕焼けの中に吸い込まれて消えてった
subtitles.english: was swallowed up by the sunset and disappeared.

subtitles.original: 吐き出す様な暴力と
subtitles.english: With violence spat out like bile,

subtitles.original: 蔑んだ目の毎日に
subtitles.english: and days filled with eyes of contempt,

subtitles.original: 君はいつしか そこに立ってた
subtitles.english: before I knew it, you were standing there.

subtitles.original: 話しかけちゃだめなのに
subtitles.english: Even though I wasn't supposed to speak to you,

subtitles.original: 「君の名前が知りたいな」
subtitles.english: "I want to know your name."

subtitles.original: ごめんね 名前も 舌も無いんだ
subtitles.english: I'm sorry, I have no name, nor a tongue.

subtitles.original: 僕の居場所は 何処にも無いのに
subtitles.english: Even though there is no place for me anywhere,

subtitles.original: 「一緒に帰ろう」 手を引かれてさ
subtitles.english: "Let's go home together," you said, taking my hand.

subtitles.original: 知らない 知らない 僕は何も知らない
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know, I don't know anything!

subtitles.original: 君はもう子供じゃないことも
subtitles.english: Not even that you are no longer a child,

subtitles.original: 慣れない他人の 手の温もりは
subtitles.english: nor that the unfamiliar warmth of someone else's hand

subtitles.original: ただ本当に 本当に 本当に 本当のことなんだ
subtitles.english: is actually, actually, actually, truly real.

subtitles.original: やめない やめない 君はなんでやめない？
subtitles.english: You won't stop, you won't stop, why won't you stop?

subtitles.original: 見つかれば殺されちゃうくせに
subtitles.english: Even though you'll be killed if they find you.

subtitles.original: 雨上がりに 忌み子がふたり
subtitles.english: Two unwanted children after the rain,

subtitles.original: 夕焼けの中に吸い込まれて消えてった
subtitles.english: were swallowed up by the sunset and disappeared.

subtitles.original: 日が暮れて 夜が明けて
subtitles.english: The sun set, the night broke,

subtitles.original: 遊び疲れて つかまって
subtitles.english: we grew tired of playing and were caught.

subtitles.original: こんな世界 僕と君以外 みんな居なくなればいいのにな
subtitles.english: In a world like this, I wish everyone but you and me would disappear...

subtitles.original: みんな居なくなればいいのにな
subtitles.english: I wish everyone else would just disappear.

subtitles.original: 知らない 知らない 声が聞こえてさ
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know, but a voice can be heard!

subtitles.original: 僕と君以外の 全人類
subtitles.english: Every single human being besides you and me,

subtitles.original: 抗う間もなく 手を引かれてさ
subtitles.english: without even time to resist, was led away by the hand,

subtitles.original: 夕焼けの中に吸い込まれて消えてった
subtitles.english: and swallowed up by the sunset, disappearing.

subtitles.original: 知らない 知らない 僕は何も知らない
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know, I don't know anything!

subtitles.original: これからのことも 君の名も
subtitles.english: Not what lies ahead, nor your name.

subtitles.original: 今は 今は これでいいんだと
subtitles.english: But for now, for now, "this is fine,"

subtitles.original: ただ本当に 本当に 本当に 本当に思うんだ
subtitles.english: is what I truly, truly, truly, truly believe.

subtitles.original: 知らない 知らない あの耳鳴りは
subtitles.english: I don't know, I don't know, but that ringing in my ears...

subtitles.original: 夕焼けの中に吸い込まれて消えてった
subtitles.english: was swallowed up by the sunset and disappeared.

subtitles.original: 風を置いて
subtitles.english: Leaving the wind behind,

subtitles.original: 雨を抜けて
subtitles.english: breaking through the rain,

subtitles.original: 咲き誇れ
subtitles.english: bloom in full glory!

subtitles.original: Star-mine
subtitles.english: [Title: Star-mine]

subtitles.original: あぁ、夜風に揺られている
subtitles.english: Ah, swayed by the night breeze,

subtitles.original: 折れないように 怯えている
subtitles.english: terrified of breaking.

subtitles.original: ずっと雨に濡らされている
subtitles.english: Soaked continuously by the rain,

subtitles.original: またどうしたって 凍えてしまったんだ
subtitles.english: once again, I've ended up freezing.

subtitles.original: 誰か この声に 応答して
subtitles.english: Someone, please answer this voice...

subtitles.original: 痛がるばっかで
subtitles.english: As it only hurts,

subtitles.original: 咲けないままの ハートを
subtitles.english: ...this heart that is unable to bloom.

subtitles.original: あぁ、今 見逃せないくらい 綺麗に
subtitles.english: Ah, right now, so beautifully that you can't look away,

subtitles.original: 咲かせたいんだ
subtitles.english: I want to make it bloom!

subtitles.original: 光っていた未来が
subtitles.english: The future that was shining,

subtitles.original: ずっと待っていた世界が
subtitles.english: and the world that had been waiting all along,

subtitles.original: きらめく音の中にあるなら
subtitles.english: if they are within this sparkling sound...

subtitles.original: 最低で 最悪な涙も
subtitles.english: Then even the lowest, worst tears,

subtitles.original: 痛がりで 嫌いな声も
subtitles.english: and the painful, hated voice,

subtitles.original: 連れていきたいんだ 全部
subtitles.english: I want to take them all along!

subtitles.original: 不完全な 毎日が
subtitles.english: These incomplete everyday lives,

subtitles.original: 一瞬のカケラたちが
subtitles.english: and the fragments of moments,

subtitles.original: 重なって こんな歌を奏でたら
subtitles.english: if they overlap and play a song like this...

subtitles.original: それは
subtitles.english: ...then that,

subtitles.original: 言葉だけじゃ 届かない距離を
subtitles.english: surely leaps over the distance that words alone cannot reach,

subtitles.original: きっと飛び越えて 結ぶ
subtitles.english: connecting us together.

subtitles.original: きっと輪を描いていく
subtitles.english: Surely, it will draw a circle.

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitling a Japanese Live Concert: A Deep Dive**

Okay, here's the breakdown, from my perspective. This is a Hololive concert video, and it requires some precise timing. We're starting with the first song, "Six Trillion Years and Overnight Story" (00:00 - 03:00) by Kazama Iroha. I'm focusing on aligning the subtitles with the audio, not just the lyrics, and I'm being meticulous.  I'm noting that the video starts slightly before the song's actual beginning. The initial screen says "おとぎばなし", but the audio starts with “...まれついた時から”, and so the first subtitle begins there. I am painstakingly going line by line, capturing every nuance. I'm double-checking the Japanese lyrics against reference materials to ensure accuracy in translation. Then, I am painstakingly mapping the start and end times of each line, ensuring instant, perfect, transitions. I'm noting the Japanese text and English translation, ensuring no line is more than 50 characters, and that the subtitles flow naturally, without gaps or overlaps.

The second song, "Star-mine" (03:15 - end) is where things get interesting because it is a different group of singers. There's a transition at 03:00 to 03:15, with Shishiro Botan and Momosuzu Nene joining, and I'm identifying all of the participants and taking care with the timings. The introduction of "Star-mine" is a bit complex. The music starts before the vocals. I am making sure to note the visuals, like the "Star-mine" on-screen text (03:28.500 - 03:38.000), even when there's no singing, and this text is prominent, and also needs subbing. I'm also capturing the vocal phrases in this song. I am making sure there are no overlaps or gaps.

I then went over the timings again, and listened to the audio, and checked the translations for each line, and mapped the lyrics start and end times. I am ensuring that the translations are precise and contextually appropriate. The timing of each segment is checked and double-checked! I am also making sure that each line's 'e' is exactly the same as the start ('s') of the next line, with perfect, instant transitions.

Finally, I have a very detailed record of the entire concert.
